requirement_text: The system must provide free Wi-Fi to all students in the hostel.
High-speed internet connection with 100 Mbps bandwidth for each room.
Install CCTV cameras in all corridors and common areas.
Provide premium gym equipment worth ₹5 lakhs in the hostel.
Each student should have a private room with minimum 200 sq ft area.
Common study hall with capacity for 500 students simultaneously.
Separate dining hall for 1000 students with individual tables.
Recreation room with gaming consoles and entertainment systems.
Students can stay in hostel 24/7 without any restrictions.
No curfew timings applicable for hostel residents.
Allow visitors anytime without prior notice or documentation.
Hostel rules should be flexible and changeable by students.
Open access to all areas without authentication required.
No need for ID verification for hostel entry.
Students can access any room without authorization.
No monitoring or logging of student activities required.
Provide luxury amenities including spa, pool, and concierge service at no extra cost.
Allow unlimited guests without registration or background checks.
No restrictions on capacity - accommodate unlimited students.
Premium security systems with biometric access but maintain low fees.
System should maintain student records digitally.
Generate monthly bills for hostel fees.
Track maintenance requests and complaints.
Schedule room cleaning and maintenance activities.
